auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Parsera API key sent in the X-API-KEY header. Create or copy it from your Parsera account after signing in: https://parsera.org/app.

actions.name: extract
actions.description: Extract structured data from a webpage URL with Parsera using a prompt, attributes, or both.

url.description: The webpage URL to extract structured data from.

name.description: The output field name for the extracted attribute.

description.description: Natural-language guidance for extracting this attribute.

type.description: Optional Parsera output type for this attribute.

items.description: A structured attribute Parsera should extract from the source.

attributes.description: The structured attributes Parsera should extract from the webpage.

proxyCountry.description: Parsera proxy country to use for the webpage request.

items.description: A browser cookie forwarded to Parsera during page extraction.

cookies.description: Cookies to use while Parsera fetches the webpage.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting structured data from a URL with Parsera.

outputSchema.description: The structured extraction payload returned by Parsera.

actions.name: extract_markdown
actions.description: Extract clean Markdown from a webpage URL with Parsera.

url.description: The webpage URL to convert into clean Markdown.

proxyCountry.description: Parsera proxy country to use for the webpage request.

items.description: A browser cookie forwarded to Parsera during page extraction.

cookies.description: Cookies to use while Parsera fetches the webpage.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting clean Markdown from a URL with Parsera.

anyOf.description: The Markdown content extracted by Parsera.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Markdown extraction result returned by Parsera.

actions.name: list_llm_specs
actions.description: List the LLM specifications available to Parsera requests.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to list Parsera LLM specs.

outputSchema.description: The list payload returned by Parsera.

actions.name: list_proxy_countries
actions.description: List proxy countries available to Parsera extraction requests.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to list Parsera proxy countries.

outputSchema.description: The list payload returned by Parsera.

actions.name: parse
actions.description: Parse structured attributes from raw HTML or text content already available to the caller.

content.description: Raw HTML or text content to parse.

name.description: The output field name for the extracted attribute.

description.description: Natural-language guidance for extracting this attribute.

type.description: Optional Parsera output type for this attribute.

items.description: A structured attribute Parsera should extract from the source.

attributes.description: The structured attributes Parsera should extract from the supplied content.

mode.description: Parsera extractor mode to use for parsing.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for parsing structured data from raw HTML or text with Parsera.

outputSchema.description: The structured extraction payload returned by Parsera.
